title: Thelypteris × insularis
taxonomy: Thelypteris × insularis is a hybrid species within the genus Thelypteris. It belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as marsh ferns. Thelypteris × insularis is not a naturally occurring species in the wild but has been cultivated for its unique characteristics. The classification of Thelypteris × insularis can be broken down into kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales. As a hybrid species, its classification may vary depending on the specific parent species.
